title: iberis linifolia var. vinetorum
intro: Iberis linifolia var. vinetorum, also known as Rock-cress or Alpine Rock-cress, is a plant species belonging to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Iberis linifolia var. vinetorum include its potential to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or topical applications, such as salves or creams, to harness its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
